description: CompositionWhite shirt with stripes in purple tones made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, collar with tape detailing on the inseam, buttoned placket on the front, overlock stitch detailing, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered brand name and a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or dry clean Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryGet ready for a cool, rugged look in this striped shirt from lee. The patch pocket and overlocked detailing adds an element of interest, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
